themes.title: Notification Delivery Improvements
themes.description: Enhancing the reliability and performance of notification delivery.

themes.title: User Engagement and Preferences
themes.description: Improving user interaction with notifications through preferences and feedback.

themes.title: Optimization and Compliance
themes.description: Optimizing notification timing and ensuring compliance with standards.

milestones.name: MVP - Notification Delivery Fixes
milestones.description: Implement critical fixes for notification delivery on Android 14 and reduce latency.
milestones.success_criteria: Notification delivery on Android 14 is reliable with latency reduced by 50%.

milestones.name: V1 - User Preferences and Feedback
milestones.description: Add user preference page and collect feedback on notification preferences.
milestones.success_criteria: User preference page is live with at least 100 users providing feedback.

milestones.name: V2 - Optimization and Compliance
milestones.description: Experiment with notification timing optimization and document compliance.
milestones.success_criteria: Achieve a 30% improvement in notification engagement and complete compliance documentation.

sequencing.reason: User preferences and feedback mechanisms depend on the successful delivery of notifications.
Optimization efforts and compliance documentation require insights gained from user feedback.

mvp.goal: Establish a reliable notification delivery system.

v1.goal: Enhance user engagement through preferences and feedback.

v2.goal: Optimize notification delivery and ensure compliance.
